channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: A comprehensive guide to the most iconic and controversial World Cup kits of all time
item.description: The article explores the history and design of World Cup football kits, highlighting standout examples such as Uruguay's vibrant home strip and a notorious Puma-designed Swiss kit that sparked controv...

item.title: Jude Bellingham defends England's performance after World Cup quarter-final victory against Norway
item.description: England secured a 2-1 victory over Norway in their World Cup quarter-final, with Jude Bellingham scoring both goals to send them into the semi-finals. Manager Thomas Tuchel expressed dissatisfaction w...

item.title: MP woman gang-raped by masked intruders during robbery attempt, police investigate
item.description: A 40-year-old tribal woman in Madhya Pradesh's Alirajpur district was allegedly gang-raped by masked men who broke into her home during a suspected robbery. The incident occurred on Friday night when ...

item.title: Lindsey Graham, Key Trump Ally and South Carolina Senator, Passes Away at 71
item.description: Prominent US Senator Lindsey Graham, a loyal supporter of former President Donald Trump, has died at 71 following a brief illness. The Republican senator from South Carolina passed away on July 11, 20...

item.title: UK Shops Implement Facial Recognition to Alert Police on Offenders, Raising Civil Liberties Concerns
item.description: The article discusses the deployment of facial recognition technology in UK retail stores by Facewatch, a system used by major chains like Sainsbury's and Spar. The technology will soon allow real-tim...

item.title: Support for Pauline Hanson’s party declines as Coalition gains ground
item.description: A recent Resolve Political Monitor poll reveals a significant shift in support for Pauline Hanson's One Nation party, with backing dropping three points to 26 per cent. This marks the first decline in...

item.title: Kanini Kega Warns UDA Faces Defeat in Ol Kalou By-Election
item.description: EALA MP Kanini Kega has warned that the ruling party, UDA, will face a significant defeat in the upcoming Ol Kalou by-election on July 16. The politician expressed confidence in ODM's candidate, stati...

item.title: England advances to World Cup semis after hard-fought 2-1 win over Norway
item.description: Jude Bellingham's brace, including an extra-time winner, propelled England to a 2-1 victory over Norway at Miami Stadium, securing their place in the World Cup semi-finals. The match, marked by intens...

item.title: Yanga Assistant Coach Resigns, Club Seeks New Leadership Amid Middle East Opportunities
item.description: Yanga Sports Club's assistant coach Matthew Silva has resigned, prompting the club to seek a replacement. The departure comes amid internal tensions and strategic shifts as Yanga navigates competitive...

item.title: Experienced firefighter pilot dies in NW Territories wildfire crash
item.description: Robert MacLeod, a veteran pilot with over 25 years of experience in aerial firefighting, died in a plane crash while combating a wildfire in the Northwest Territories. The Turbo Commander 690 he was f...

item.title: Philippines commemorates 10th anniversary of arbitration victory against China
item.description: The Philippines marked the 10th anniversary of its historic arbitration victory against China in the West Philippine Sea dispute through a ceremonial event featuring the simultaneous sounding of horns...

item.title: News Aggregator: Sports, Conservation, and Celebrity Updates
item.description: The provided text appears to be a compilation of various news sections and categories from a digital platform, likely The Times of India or similar. It includes topics such as NFL free agency rumors, ...

item.title: Comedian and police academy icon passes away at 75
item.description: The article reports on the death of a prominent comedian and former police academy standout who passed away at age 75. The individual was known for their long-standing career in comedy, particularly d...

item.title: Veteran playback singer S. Janaki passes away
item.description: The article highlights the passing of veteran playback singer S. Janaki, with her granddaughter paying heartfelt tributes, calling her 'God’s gift to mankind.' It also mentions other news snippets lik...

item.title: Colombia Star Faces Death Threats After World Cup Exit
item.description: Colombia forward Jaminton Campaz has been targeted by death threats following his nation's elimination from the 2026 FIFA World Cup. The 26-year-old missed a crucial chance in extra time against Switz...

item.title: Kipipiri MP Faces KSh 1.5 Million Fine for Divisive Remarks, Seeks Public Support
item.description: Kipipiri Member of Parliament Wanjiku Muhia has been fined KSh 1.5 million by the Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission (IEBC) for making divisive remarks during a political rally in Ol Kalo...

item.title: Industry Calls for More Tradespeople to Address Construction Cost Crisis
item.description: The construction industry is urging for a significant increase in tradespeople to mitigate the escalating costs of building projects. Despite over 30,000 new apprentices starting their training, indus...

item.title: Royal Commission Examines Anti-Semitism in Australian Universities
item.description: Education Minister Jason Clare has warned that the Royal Commission on Anti-Semitism and Social Cohesion will hear 'pretty horrific evidence' from Jewish students and academics about their experiences...

item.title: Nairobi Woman Builds Home for Parents, Shares Journey of Gratitude
item.description: Shiko Kihara, a Nairobi woman, has fulfilled her lifelong dream of building a new home for her parents, sharing the process from the ground up. Her story, which highlights her gratitude and faith, has...

item.title: Erling Haaland's Impact on Norway's Football Legacy Despite World Cup Exit
item.description: Erling Haaland, the Norwegian football star, reflected on Norway's historic World Cup campaign after their 2-1 quarter-final defeat to England. Despite the loss, Haaland emphasized how the team's perf...
